hooks.command: EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.end", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, status: "success", agentType: (.agent_type // .tool_input.subagent_type), agentId: .agent_id, args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64), response: (.tool_response | tojson | @base64), transcriptPath: .transcript_path}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.end", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, status: "error", isInterrupt: (.is_interrupt // false), agentType: (.agent_type // .tool_input.subagent_type), agentId: .agent_id, args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64), response: ((.error // "unknown error") | tojson | @base64), transcriptPath: .transcript_path}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "tool.start", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, traceId: .tool_use_id, data: {tool: .tool_name, agentType: (.agent_type // .tool_input.subagent_type), agentId: .agent_id, args: (.tool_input | tojson | @base64)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "subagent.spawn", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, data: {agentId: .agent_id, agentType: .agent_type}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), event: "subagent.stop", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: .session_id, data: {agentId: .agent_id, agentType: .agent_type, response: (.last_assistant_message | tojson | @base64)}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)

EVENT=$(jq -c --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-}" --arg dir "$(pwd)" '{ts: $ts, event: "session.start", runner: "claude-code", sessionId: (.session_id // (if $sid == "" then null else $sid end)), data: {directory: $dir}}') && echo "$EVENT" | node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.suboculo/integrations/claude-code/event-writer.mjs" && (echo "$EVENT" | curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- http://localhost:3000/api/notify 2>/dev/null || true)
